race.description: The Industry Platform Kokoda Cup Hcp
race.comment: ABOUT TO EXPLODE (6) has a solid record over this track and trip who has four wins and two seconds from eight attempts and will be at peak fitness for this fifth run back. Handles all going and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. RESTONICA (4) has won four of his past five outings including back-to-back victories over this course and distance. Hard to ignore winning form. HATCHET (1) goes well for hoop Duric who has three wins and two placings from just six rides. Include from the inside marble. The well-named REDFORD (5) (out of dam Dream Date) rounds out the selections. Not sure he would want any more rain but if it stays away and the track holds up he's in the mix.
